metadata.synopsis: Most moms are wonderful cooks, this one...likes it raw! Something's been eating Clay Dwyer. His mom! Once a sweet lovable lady, she's been bitten by and transformed into a flesheater, turning her into a hungry creature with a knack for good old homestyle cooking. What is Clay to do? To everyone else she's a monster that must be destroyed. But to him she's still MOM.
metadata.title: Mom

metadata.synopsis: When a rocket lands on Mars, the crew finds the planet not entirely dead. As the team begins to explore, they are attacked by horrific and demented creatures at every turn. Battling for their lives, can the survivors make it back to their ship?
metadata.title: The Angry Red Planet

metadata.synopsis: John Saxon, Dennis Hopper and the legendary Basil Rathbone star in this atmospheric -- and influential -- sci-fi cult classic as a team of astronauts embark upon a rescue mission to Mars only to encounter a seductive alien, The Queen of Blood!
metadata.title: Queen Of Blood

metadata.synopsis: The streets of London are transformed into a smorgasbord for an alien creature with a taste for human flesh. Don't just panic…run for your lives!
metadata.title: The Quatermass Xperiment

metadata.synopsis: In this bee-witching tale, when men working at a government lab start dropping dead, Special Agent Neil Agar (William Smith) discovers their deaths may be connected to a beautiful entomologist (Anitra Ford) and her mysterious experiments with bees!
metadata.title: Invasion Of The Bee Girls

metadata.synopsis: Local veterinarian Rack Hansen (William Shatner) and the sleepy little town of Verde Valley soon find themselves right in the center of an eight-legged nightmare when thousands of tarantulas suddenly mutate... and are on the hunt for food!
metadata.title: Kingdom Of The Spiders
